recall_text: 1. A woman called Mrs. Costa is recalling 2. the death of her daughter Marie 28 years ago, 3. who died in hospital after an operation. 4. She got a call to come and collect her 5. so gathered her belongings and some clothes, 6. but by the time she arrived 7. the girl had passed out 8. and was being worked on by doctors, 9. and then passed away from a suspected blood clot. 10. The woman is screaming in the hospital. 11. Her other daughter Rita eventually arrives 12. with her own husband, 13. after her mother hasn't returned home, 14. and also discovers Marie has died. 15. They then return home 16. and the rest of the family find out. 17. Her husband has a heart attack, 18. then later so does her son Michael. 19. The youngest son James is told 20. to run and tell his aunt Milly and aunt Jenny 21. and does so, 22. he arrives with red eyes 23. and tells them Marie has died 24. after they ask what’s wrong. 25. 28 years later Rita still suffers 26. with terrible pain in her leg.

1. My daughter Marie died. 2. She was admitted to the Methodist Hospital 28 years ago this month. 3. She passed away after they had tried to stand up. 4. She was being released. 5. She got a blood clot on her leg. 6. I was going to pick her up. 7. I found out when I got to the hospital. 8. When I got home, my husband was waiting. 9. He had a heart attack when he found out. 10. My eldest son had a heart attack as well. 11. My other son had to go round. 12. He had to tell his aunties. 13. Marie had passed away.

1. Marie was in hospital 28 years ago for appendicitis, 2. the nurse tried to get her out of bed too soon 3. and she collapsed with a blood clot in her leg, 4. her sister Victoria was there, 5. the nurse rang Mrs. Costa, 6. Marie's mother, 7. once she reached the hospital 8. she was told her daughter had died, 9. she was hysterical, 10. pulling her hair 11. screaming at the doctors to leave her daughter alone, 12. saying she would kill them 13. and burn down the hospital. 14. Going home 15. she told her husband, 16. who had a heart attack 17. and her son Michael had a heart attack as well. 18. She told her son Jamie 19. to tell her two sisters, 20. Marie's aunties, 21. that she had died.

1. Marie, an 18 year old girl, went into the hospital for a surgery 2. and died from a blood clot, 3. 28 years ago. 4. Her mother, Mrs. Costa, recalls the event. 5. She started her day with a cup of coffee 6. and headed to the hospital to pick her daughter up from this routine surgery. 7. There was another lady she knew there, 8. who was a mother. 9. She prayed that the mother would be ok 10. and when doing so saw nurses running for blankets etc. 11. She then learned that her daughter had fainted 12. and was pooling with sweat. 13. She then learned that her daughter had died 14. which put her into a state of shock. 15. She was hysterical 16. and the dr wanted to give her a shot there afterward to calm her down 17. which she refused. 18. Her daughter got a call from the hospital 19. that they were waiting for the mother to pick her up, 20. confused she headed over to the hospital 21. to find her mother, Mrs. Costa, in a hysterical state. 22. She then learned her sister had died. 23. She fell to the ground 24. causing an injury to her leg that she still deals with today. 25. She took her mother home 26. and her mother informed her husband 27. as well as one of her brothers, the older one. 28. Both men had heart attacks when they learned the news. 29. The youngest of the two brothers was sent to inform his aunts, Jenny and Millie, of what happened. 30. They recalled Marie being a nice and quiet girl.

1. Mrs Costa lost a daughter named Marie 2. who had died from an appendicitis operation. 3. She had told everyone 4. and the entire neighbourhood 5. her daughter would be coming back the same day, 6. but instead the daughter passed away. 7. She was devastated 8. and the doctors asked to give her something 9. and she declined. 10. She went home 11. and told her husband 12. who end up having a heart attack 13. and her son Micheal 14. who also had a heart attack. 15. She sent her little son Jamie 16. to go tell his two aunts about the death. 17. The operation happened 20th of April 18. and a male doctor performed the operation 19. with the help of a female doctor. 20. Mrs Costa had her hair pulled 21. and she kept screaming 22. until everybody came out 23. and stood at their door.

1. Mrs Mary Costas tells the story 2. of when she was younger 3. and her daughter, Marie died. 4. She died post surgery 5. from a blood clot. 6. She was supposed to be discharged that day 7. when Mrs Costas went to pick up her daughter, 8. she got sick 9. and then fainted, 10. but she actually died. 11. Mrs Costas had a bad breakdown, 12. was hysterical, 13. hurting herself 14. and threatening others. 15. When she got home, 16. Mike, the father, had a heart attack. 17. Mrs Costas had 3 surgeries within a year 22. so she knew all the nurses.

1. There is a woman (Mrs. Costa) telling a story 2. about how her daughter Marie has passed away 3. at a hospital 4. due to a blood clot. 5. The mother was furious 18. and yelling at the hospital staff 19. that they killed her 20. and was screaming for them not to touch her 21. because they wanted to check the cause of death. 22. Mrs. Costa was hysterical 23. and yelling 24. and telling the doctors that operated on Marie 25. that she will kill them 26. if they got any closer to her 27. and when Mrs. Costa got home 28. she told her husband Michael 29. that Marie was dead 30. and the husband had a heart attack 31. and in the end 32. there was something about an orange from the aunt 33. and that is all I remember.

1. A woman named Mary has a daughter named Marie 2. who was a very good and quiet child 3. who went into the hospital for appendicitis. 4. During recovery, she was made to get up from the bed 5. and sit in a chair 6. where she fainted 7. that caused a blood clot 8. that led to her death 9. 28 years ago on the 30th of April 10. when she was only 18 years old. 11. Mary did not have a phone at home 12. so the woman from the store received the call 13. when it was time to retrieve Marie from the hospital. 14. But she died 15. shortly after she arrived 16. after saying goodbye to Arlene and other women at the hospital. 17. Mary became very distraught, 18. screaming and pulling at her hair 19. and threatening to kick and kill people 20. and burn the hospital to the ground with everyone in it. 21. They tried to give her a shot 22. and she wondered if they wanted to kill her, too, 23. after killing her daughter. 24. Mary had three surgeries over a short period of time 25. at the hospital 26. so all of the nurses knew her. 27. She was taken home by hospital staff 28. and screamed the entire way. 29. People came out of their houses to see what the matter was. 30. Her husband had come home from work 31. to wash and shave 32. and wait for her and Marie to arrive from the hospital, 33. then had a heart attack upon hearing the news. 34. Her older son (Michael?) also had a heart attack. 35. Her sisters, Jenny and Millie, were to be there to greet Marie. 36. One had brought her a big orange. 37. The youngest son, James, was sent to tell them the news, 38. and arrived with reddened eyes.

1. It was being told by Mrs Costa. 2. 28 years ago her daughter Maria went to hospital 3. and needed to have her appendix out. 4. After 10 days the hospital called a neighbour 5. to say she was ready to be collected 6. (as Mrs Costa did not have a phone). 7. Mrs Costa went to hospital to collect Maria 8. with a change of clothes (a dress). 9. When she arrived she was asked by a nurse if Maria ever fainted. 10. When Mrs Costa saw her daughter 11. she saw she was sweating, 12. they called a female doctor 13. but Maria died. 14. Mrs Costa was hysterical - 15. Maria was wearing her house coat and slipper. 16. Mrs Costa was taken home 17. where she met Mr Costa 18. who was waiting on the front step. 19. When she told him what had happened 20. he had a heart attack. 21. She then sent her youngest son to her sister's 22. (his Aunts) 23. to tell them the news. 24. Maria died of a blood clot.

1. My daughter died. 2. 20 and some months ago. 3. She was in the hospital for a surgery. 4. When I arrived at the hospital. 5. There was a chair there in the corner of the room. 6. I asked the nurse "Why is there a chair there?" 7. She replied "So you have a place to sit." 8. A couple weeks later. 9. I got a call from the doctor. 10. Saying that Marie was ready to be discharged. 11. I was cooking at the time. 12. I told someone to finish cooking. 13. While I go pick up Marie. 14. "Go to the bakery and get a cake for Marie." 15. I told my husband. 16. After getting ready. 17. I placed my coat & Marie's clothes over 1 arm. 18. & headed out to go pick her up. 19. Once I arrived at the hospital. 20. I was told to wait in the lobby. 21. While the nurses go get Marie ready. 22. At the time. 23. There was a mother of 10 children. 24. That was my neighbor. 25. Getting surgery for a gallbladder stone. 26. I prayed to God that she made it through. 27. "Dear lord, please do not take this mother away from her children." 28. The nurse came back then. 29. Picked up the phone. 30. She came to me. 31. And asked "Has your daughter ever had tendencies to faint?" 32. She told me. 33. That as Marie was getting ready to leave. 34. She said "Oh my leg hurts, and I can't see." 35. Before she fainted. 36. And had a cold sweat. 37. She was sweating beads of sweat. 38. They were that big I tell you. 39. "What did you do?! You killed my daughter!" 40. I yelled at the nurse. 41. A doctor rushed in. 42. "We don't know what happened." 43. I was banging my head against the wall. 44. Hair pulled out. 45. & hysterical. 46. My other daughter & husband were wondering what was taking so long to bring home Marie. 47. So my other daughter went to the hospital as well. 48. She heard me screaming. 49. And asked what was going on. 50. "They killed Marie!" 51. I told her. 52. She dropped to her knees. 53. Staring blankly at the floor. 54. Marie's leg was hard as a pole. 55. From the blood clot she had. 56. Still hysterical. 57. They brought me to an office. 58. To remove me from the hospital. 59. I was still screaming. 60. Hair pulled out. 61. Hysterical. 62. When I got home. 63. My husband was sitting in front of the house. 64. & asked what happened. 65. "We lost Marie, Marie is dead." 66. I told him. 67. Hearing the news. 68. He had a heart attack. 69. I called everyone. 70. To tell them what had happened. 71. I told my son James. 72. To go tell my sister and mother. 73. About what happened. 74. "Why are you crying little James?" 75. Asked my sister. 76. "Auntie, Granny... Marie died." 77. He told them.

1. Mrs. Coastal lost Marlie, her daughter, at a hospital, 2. before Marlie died, her elder sister was admitted to the hospital, 3. Mrs. Coastal went to check Marry, 4. and she confirmed she was with her bathroom slippers. 5. I was hysterical, 6. saw me like that, 7. we lost Marry. 8. Mike, we lost Mary, 19. my husband had a heart attack. 20. My younger sister brought orange for my daughter. 21. I called my brother-in-law, 22. he was an undertaker, 23. I sent my son James, 24. he was little then, 25. the death was a shock to everybody in my neighborhood.

1. I remember it like it was yesterday. 2. I had just gotten a message telling me to come over, so I went. 3. When I arrived, they asked me to sit down. 4. I was trying to shake off the feeling when the nurse said to me, “Has your daughter ever had a fainting spell?” 12. And right then, my heart sank. 13. I rushed to the room. 14. I saw my daughter Marie lying there. 15. Her slippers still on. 16. Sweat just pouring off of her. 17. I couldn't believe it—I just kept yelling, "What did you do to her? You killed my daughter!" 18. The doctors were trying to explain. 19. All I could hear was them telling me they didn’t know what had happened. 20. My beautiful Marie... she was only 18. 21. I was hysterical. 22. I was pulling at my hair, screaming. 23. She was supposed to come home that day. 24. We had everything ready. 25. My husband was waiting at home for her. 26. Sitting on the step. 27. Not knowing what was about to happen. 28. When the hospital called the store, they asked, "When is the mother coming to pick up Marie?" 29. But my family, who was with me, knew something wasn't right. 30. They all rushed back to the hospital. 31. Thinking maybe I had gotten sick myself because of my heart condition. 32. But when they arrived. 33. They saw me in the state I was in. 34. They knew. 35. I told them, "We lost Marie. Marie died." 36. It was chaos. 37. My daughter Rita collapsed on the floor. 38. As if struck by lightning. 39. She heard the news. 40. She’s been suffering ever since. 41. Dealing with pain that comes and goes. 42. Doctors later said it was a blood clot that caused Marie’s death. 43. The girl who was with her said the last thing Marie complained about was pain in her leg. 44. Not being able to see. 45. And then she collapsed. 46. When I got home, the entire neighborhood could hear my screams. 47. My husband was sitting there. 48. Asking, "What happened?" 49. I told him, "We lost Marie." 50. He had a heart attack right there on the spot. 51. That same night, my son Michael collapsed too. 52. It was just devastation all around. 53. Everyone had been waiting for Marie to come home that day. 54. My youngest sister had even brought a giant orange for her as a little gift. 55. But instead of celebrating her coming home, we were left to deal with this heartbreaking loss. 56. It shocked everyone. 57. My family. 58. The neighbors. 59. Everyone who knew Marie. 60. She was such a quiet, sweet girl. 61. And now... she was gone.
